title: AHG Heartbeat Vector
description: Compressed cognitive signal emitted by each DGAF agent to the AHG Sidecar Monitor per turn. Only D_e enters S(t). D_explore and D_correct are tracked separately. Schema v1.0 - P-42 AHG v1.3.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for the emitting agent (e.g. Herald, DemiJoule, Amethyst)

timestamp_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when heartbeat was emitted

d_e.description: Destabilizing entropy signal [0,1]. Enters S(t). Represents hallucinations, off-task loops, contradictions.

d_explore.description: Exploratory divergence signal [0,1]. Excluded from S(t). Preserved - feeds Novelty.

d_correct.description: Corrective dissent signal [0,1]. Excluded from S(t). Preserved - fuel for Apogee Auditor archetype.

novelty.description: Proportion of turn content not present in prior turns [0,1]. Enters S(t) as N.

constraint_count.description: Number of active blocking constraints this agent is operating under this turn

total_constraints.description: Total constraints defined for this agent. Used to compute C fraction = constraint_count / total_constraints.

revision_count.description: Number of self-corrections or corrections to other agents this turn. Enters S(t) as R.

total_turns.description: Total turns elapsed so far. Used to normalise revision rate R = revision_count / total_turns.

phase_space.description: Optional 3D Cognitive Phase Space context vector (AHG_ARCHITECTURE.md §2.7). Not used in phi computation but available for Tribunal recovery path selection.

metadata.description: Optional agent-specific metadata for trace/audit purposes
